underlying_goal: Fix a bug where TaskWorker nodes overlap in the workflow auto-layout when groups get too large
friction_detail: Claude got sidetracked fixing layout timing/triggering issues when the real bug was always the width calculation, introduced a setup error, and struggled with debug logging visibility.
brief_summary: User wanted to fix overlapping workflow nodes caused by incorrect width calculation; after several detours into timing issues and debugging struggles, the actual width calculation bug was identified and fixed.
